DashboardOne daily view for the whole business.Studio ReviewUpload, comment, approve and version creative work.Workspace StorageLibraries, permissions, versions and linked files.CRM, Reports & FinanceClients, reports, invoices and business admin.

Sign inGet started free
Start

Pricing

Start free. Scale when ready.

Plans are built around real workspace needs: storage, reviews, users, permissions, clients, reports, invoices and AI.

Free

For testing CSorro or running a small solo setup.

£0/mo
  • 1 workspace
  • 3 projects
  • 2GB storage
  • Basic tasks and storage
  • Community access
Start free

Creator

For solo operators, freelancers and small workflows.

£5.99/mo
  • 3 workspaces
  • 25GB storage
  • Studio Review basics
  • Public profile
  • CORE basic
Choose Creator

Studio

For growing teams that need review, clients and control.

£14.99/mo
  • 10 workspaces
  • 250GB storage
  • Unlimited Studio Reviews
  • Client portal
  • Advanced permissions
  • Reports and invoices
Choose Studio

Business

For companies that want CSorro as their operating system.

£49.99/mo
  • Unlimited workspaces
  • 2TB storage
  • CRM + Finance
  • Unlimited guests
  • Audit logs
  • Advanced CORE AI
  • Priority support
Choose Business
FeatureFreeCreatorStudioBusiness
Workspace storage2GB25GB250GB2TB
Studio ReviewLimitedBasicUnlimitedUnlimited + client approvals
CRM——Client portalFull CRM
Reports & invoices—BasicIncludedAdvanced
PermissionsBasicBasicAdvancedAdvanced + audit logs
CORE AIBasicBasicWorkspace assistantAdvanced assistant
CSorro OS
Built in Hull, United Kingdom. The business operating system for modern teams.
